chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 315 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: لِلرِّجَالِ «قُصُّوا أَظَافِيرَكُمْ» وَ لِلنِّسَاءِ «اُتْرُكْنَ مِنْ أَظْفَارِكُنَّ فَإِنَّهُ أَزْيَنُ لَكُنَّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.315 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
For men: ‘trim your nails’, and for women: ‘let your nails grow a bit, for it is (source of) beauty for you.’
